title: Add baseline H100 training report and process docs
body:
## Summary

- **Training report**: Baseline run on 1x H100 SXM — **1.3274 BPB** (1404 steps in 600s wallclock cap)
- **Process guide**: End-to-end RunPod + runpodctl setup, training, and evaluation playbook
- **Next ideas**: Proposed experiments to close the gap toward SOTA (~1.14 BPB), including QAT int6/int5, 3x MLP, SwiGLU gating, and bigram hash

## Files

All files are in `records/xuafeng_baseline/`:

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `report.md` | Full training metrics, model config, and observations |
| `process.md` | Repeatable step-by-step guide for future runs |
| `next_ideas.md` | 8 proposed improvements with expected impact estimates |

## Key Results

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| val_bpb (int8+zlib roundtrip) | 1.3274 |
| val_loss | 2.2412 |
| Steps completed | 1404 / 20000 |
| Training wall time | 600.3s |
| Compressed model size | 13.8 MB (under 16 MB) |
| GPU | 1x NVIDIA H100 80GB SXM |

## Test plan

- [x] Training completed successfully on RunPod H100
- [x] Results verified via int8+zlib roundtrip evaluation
- [x] All docs reviewed for accuracy

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

comments.body: Closing to resubmit with proper folder structure per submission guidelines.
